title: CC: Androids
body:
## CC:Androids
Adds programmable humanoid robots to Minecraft that are capable of interacting with the world and engaging in simple combat.

**This mod requires CC:Tweaked to run**

![Three Androids sitting on a hill holding various items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001ec8c7dea012ff5d0ead98f526b843331ae396.png)

Androids can be used for automation, combat and whatever other use you can think of!
As of right now androids are capable of:
- Breaking and placing blocks
- Picking up and storing items
- Using items on blocks and entities
- Attacking mobs and players
- Sending chat messages

![An Android mining obsidian equipped with a diamond pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZJAYwpFc/images/2416c04bccb11f4c4150e11cb96cc0caceab1c2f_350.webp)

***

### [Wiki](https://github.com/ThunderBear2006/CC-Androids/wiki)
The mod has a wiki which contains all the information you need to get started!

### [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/ThunderBear2006/CC-Androids/issues)
Report bugs and suggest changes on the issue tracker!
